summary: Iteration 56 - Drivers, Geocoding, and Ratings Page Testing COMPLETE. Backend APIs: 100% pass (18/18 tests). Frontend: Ratings page working, Address suggestions working. One issue found: Ratings button missing from Dashboard due to settings key mismatch.

ui_bugs.issue: التقييمات (Ratings) button not visible in Dashboard quick actions
ui_bugs.root_cause: Dashboard settings API returns 'showReviews' but Dashboard.js expects 'showRatings'. The fetchDashboardSettings() replaces entire state with API response, losing the default showRatings: true

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/drivers - PASSED (returns list of drivers)
Backend: POST /api/drivers - PASSED (creates driver with name, phone, branch_id)
Backend: GET /api/geocode/reverse (Baghdad) - PASSED (returns address from coordinates)
Backend: GET /api/geocode/search (بغداد العراق) - PASSED (returns search results)
Backend: GET /api/geocode/search with location bias - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/drivers/{id}/location - PASSED (updates driver GPS location)
Frontend: Ratings page shows summary, distribution, detailed ratings - PASSED
Frontend: Add to cart works - PASSED
Frontend: Address suggestions appear when typing - PASSED
Frontend: Address selection fills address field - PASSED
Frontend: Location confirmation shows after address selection - PASSED
action_items: FIX: Add 'showRatings' to dashboard settings API response OR change Dashboard.js to use 'showReviews' key for ratings button
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard settings key mismatch: API returns 'showReviews' but Dashboard.js uses 'showRatings'
Drivers API uses Pydantic model DriverCreate for both POST and PUT, requiring full body with name, phone, branch_id
Geocoding uses Nominatim API (free) - works well for address search and reverse geocoding
Driver location update uses POST /api/drivers/{id}/location (not PUT)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_drivers_geocode_ratings_iter56.py - Created comprehensive test file for drivers, geocoding, and ratings APIs
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed drivers during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working: 1) Ratings page at /ratings shows customer ratings summary, distribution, and recent ratings with branch filter. 2) Drivers CRUD APIs work correctly (POST requires JSON body with name, phone, branch_id). 3) Geocoding APIs (reverse and search) work using Nominatim. 4) Address suggestions in checkout page work correctly. ONE ISSUE: Ratings button not visible in Dashboard due to settings key mismatch (showReviews vs showRatings).

endpoints.POST /api/drivers: Creates driver (requires JSON body: name, phone, branch_id)
endpoints.PUT /api/drivers/{id}: Updates driver (requires JSON body: name, phone, branch_id)

endpoints.GET /api/geocode/reverse: Converts lat/lng to address using Nominatim

address_suggestions.behavior: Shows dropdown suggestions when typing 3+ characters
address_suggestions.selection: Fills address field and shows location confirmation

dashboard_ratings_button.expected: Yellow button with star icon labeled 'التقييمات'
dashboard_ratings_button.actual: NOT VISIBLE due to settings key mismatch
